parameters.jsCode: const meta=$items('Parse Chat Command')[0].json;const origin=meta.origin;function getBody(o){for(const k of ['body','data','response','text']){if(typeof o[k]==='string')return o[k];}for(const v of Object.values(o)){if(typeof v==='string'&&v.length>50)return v;}return '';}function stripTags(s){return String(s||'').replace(/<[^>]+>/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();}function typeHas(t,val){if(!t)return false;if(Array.isArray(t))return t.map(x=>String(x)).some(x=>x===val||x.includes(val));const s=String(t);return s===val||s.includes(val);}const items=$input.all();const out=[];for(const it of items){const j=it.json||{};const url=j.url||j.candidateUrl||j.link||'';const html=getBody(j)||'';if(!url||!html||html.length<200){out.push({json:{url,isProduct:false}});continue;}const re=new RegExp('<script[^>]*application/ld\\+json[^>]*>([\\s\\S]*?)</script>','gi');const scripts=[];let m;while((m=re.exec(html))!==null){scripts.push((m[1]||'').trim());}const objs=[];for(const s of scripts){if(!s)continue;try{const parsed=JSON.parse(s);const arr=Array.isArray(parsed)?parsed:[parsed];for(const o of arr){if(o&&typeof o==='object'){if(Array.isArray(o['@graph'])){for(const g of o['@graph'])objs.push(g);}objs.push(o);}}}catch(e){}}let prod=null;for(const o of objs){if(o&&typeHas(o['@type'],'Product')){prod=o;break;}}let bc=null;for(const o of objs){if(o&&typeHas(o['@type'],'BreadcrumbList')){bc=o;break;}}let name=(prod&&prod.name)?String(prod.name).trim():'';if(!name){const titleMatch=html.match(new RegExp('<title[^>]*>([\\s\\S]*?)</title>','i'));if(titleMatch)name=stripTags(titleMatch[1]).split('|')[0].split('-')[0].trim();}let price=null;let currency=null;if(prod&&prod.offers){const off=Array.isArray(prod.offers)?prod.offers[0]:prod.offers;currency=off&&off.priceCurrency?String(off.priceCurrency):null;let pr=null;if(off){pr=off.price??(off.priceSpecification&&off.priceSpecification.price)??null;}if(pr!=null){const s=String(pr).replace(',','.').replace(/[^0-9.]/g,'');const n=parseFloat(s);if(Number.isFinite(n))price=n;}}let categoryPath='';if(bc&&bc.itemListElement){const els=Array.isArray(bc.itemListElement)?bc.itemListElement:[bc.itemListElement];const names=[];for(const el of els){const item=el&&el.item?el.item:el;const nm=(item&&item.name)?item.name:(el&&el.name)?el.name:'';if(nm)names.push(String(nm).trim());}const cleaned=names.filter(x=>x&&x.toLowerCase()!=='home'&&x.toLowerCase()!=='inicio');if(cleaned.length>0){let last=cleaned[cleaned.length-1];if(name&&last&&last.toLowerCase()===name.toLowerCase())cleaned.pop();categoryPath=cleaned.join(' > ');}}if(!categoryPath){try{const p=new URL(url).pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean);const seg=p.slice(0,Math.max(1,Math.min(3,p.length-1)));categoryPath=seg.map(s=>decodeURIComponent(s)).join(' > ');}catch(e){categoryPath='';}}let sku='';const itemNo=html.match(/Item\s*No\.?\s*[:\-]?\s*([A-Z0-9\-_.]+)/i);if(itemNo)sku=String(itemNo[1]).trim();const isProduct=!!prod||!!(name&&price!==null);out.push({json:{url,isProduct,name,price,currency,category:categoryPath||'Sin categoria',sku}});}return out;
